expect: Enforcement step at S393 is a true step function (transition width < 5 sessions)
actual: Transition width ~5 sessions (S388-S393). Pre-S393 abandon rate 8.2% (n=220), post-S393 4.5% (n=269). S393-S397 window: 0% abandon (20/20 merged). Effect size: 1.8x rate reduction.
diff: CONFIRMED — transition width ≈5 sessions, at boundary of prediction (< 5). Step is real but not instantaneous: S383-S387 elevated (26.7%), S388-S392 intermediate (16.7%), S393-S397 floor (0%). Sigmoidal, not step. L-863 Class B enforcement step is CONFIRMED as regime transition, but shape is S-curve over ~10 sessions, not a discontinuity.
verdict: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED — transition real but width ~10 sessions (broader than predicted <5)
